About Cinturon360

Built by an operator who asked why travel tech was still stuck in 2005.

Cinturon360 is the answer. A modern operating layer for travel management companies — built from first principles, not incremental improvements to a broken status quo.

Why we're building this

The industry has been patching the same problem for decades

Travel management companies sit at the centre of a $1.4 trillion global market. They manage booking, policy, compliance, and reporting for thousands of corporate clients. And most of them are doing it with software built before the iPhone existed.

Tramada, Crosscheck, legacy mid-office tools — these weren't bad products. They were the right tools for their era. But that era ended. NDC changed distribution. Cloud changed expectations. Compliance requirements moved. The industry patched around the gap instead of rebuilding.

Cinturon360 is the rebuild. A platform that treats TMC operations as a first-class design problem — not an afterthought bolted onto a booking tool or expense system built for corporate buyers.

We're building this in APAC, where Tramada's dominance makes the opportunity clear, and scaling it globally. No rip-and-replace. No forced migrations. Just a better platform that fits into how TMCs already work — and then makes them better at it.

What we believe

These aren't aspirational values. They're the constraints we design to.

🔄

No rip-and-replace

TMCs have supplier relationships, booking channels, and client configurations built over years. We work with what's there — connecting to GDS, NDC, and direct suppliers as they are, not as we wish they were.

⚙️

Operations first

Every feature starts with how a TMC actually operates — not how a corporate buyer or investor thinks they operate. That distinction matters. It's why every other tool in this space gets the details wrong.

📊

Visibility is a right, not a report

Finance teams shouldn't need to wait for a monthly export to know what was spent. Real-time visibility is a platform feature, not a bolt-on. We build for CFOs, not for compliance theatre.

Who Cinturon360 serves

TMCs are the primary customer. Their corporate, government, and leisure clients are the beneficiaries.

🏢

Travel Management Companies

The primary design audience. TMCs run Cinturon360 to manage their client portfolio — onboarding, policy, approvals, integrations, reporting, and operational scale.

Learn more
💼

Corporate Travel Programs

CFOs, travel managers, and procurement teams get pre-trip approvals, policy enforcement, and finance-grade reporting through their TMC's Cinturon360 platform.

Learn more
🏛️

Government & Controlled Environments

Audit-grade governance, structured approvals, and defensible records for travel programs operating under strict accountability requirements.

Learn more
✈️

Leisure & High-Net-Worth

Structured oversight for premium leisure programs. Governance and visibility tools for advisors managing HNW clients who expect precision and discretion.

Learn more
The team

Built by RePass Cloud

Danijel-James Wynyard

Founder — RePass Cloud Pty Ltd

Serial founder and operator. Danijel has built and scaled software businesses across industries, applying an operator's lens to problems that insiders have stopped noticing — because they've been too close for too long.

Cinturon360 came from a clear observation: the travel industry runs critical commercial operations on infrastructure that would be unacceptable in any other sector. The opportunity to replace it — not patch it — was too obvious to ignore.

RePass Cloud Pty Ltd is an Australian company based in Sydney, building for the APAC market first and scaling globally.

Connect on LinkedIn

Cinturon360 is in early development. We're building the team as the platform grows. Interested in joining? See open roles or reach out directly.

Want to be part of building this?

We're speaking with TMCs, design partners, and investors who see what we see. The window to help shape this platform is open now.
